description: CompositionPurple kurta made of 100% viscose, has a deep V-neck with sequins all over the yoke, three quarter sleeves and slits on the sidesFittingRegularWash careDry clean onlyDo not steamDo not bleachEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this dark purple kurta from scullers! Look ethnically hip in the silky kurta with the sequined panels, while the viscose accentuates your figure. Team this kurta with leggings and chunky accessories for a great look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
